cards.desc:
## Snapshot
- Fund: BITKRAFT Ventures
- HQ: Los Angeles, California, United States
- Stage focus: Seed, Series A, Series B
- Check size: $500K - $10M
- ICP Tier: Priority A (score 3/4)
- Geo coverage: Global
- Contact(s): pitch@bitkraft.vc
- CRM Record: Pending remote DB (need to attach once live)

## Personalization & Why Now
Built by founders for founders, BITKRAFT is a global early- and mid-stage investment platform for gaming, esports, and interactive media. We focus on Seed, Series A, and Series B investments in game studios, interactive platforms, and immersive technology.
Vision of Synthetic Reality (https://www.bitkraft.vc/vision/)—the increasing convergence of the physical and digital worlds
Map our AI-enabled sourcing + daily packet engine to their stated interest in gaming/interactive platforms.

## Outreach Plan
- Opening: Noticed BITKRAFT Ventures leaning into Seed deals—our latest gaming/AI pipeline fits your check sizes ($500K - $10M).
- CTA: Offer to send investor packet now + line up 30-min partner call next week.
- Owner: Ops (packet build) / Lucas (approval)
- Send target: 24 Feb 2026 12:00 CST

## Attachments & Proof
- Deck: Upload latest deck link once finalized
- Metrics: Insert February KPI snapshot
- Case Study: Highlight strongest gaming/AI proof point

## Follow-up
- Day 3 reminder: 27 Feb 2026 via Slack ping
- Day 7 reminder: 03 Mar 2026 + bump email
- Notes: Update with replies / meetings
cards.name: Packet: BITKRAFT Ventures

checkItems.name: Confirm fund HQ, stage focus, check size, and ICP tier
Draft 2-3 sentence Why Now blurb referencing recent signal
Capture partner/contact info with direct email + social proof
Attach deck + metrics doc + case study/press links
Write approval-ready outbound snippet (email or DM)
Link CRM record + status in description
Assign owner + due date for send once approved
Schedule Day 3 and Day 7 reminders (Follow-up list)
Log Lucas approval decision + timestamp
Record reply / meeting outcome in comments

cards.desc:
### ICP & Success Metrics (24 Feb 2026)
- Target: independent Seed–Series A gaming / AI / devtools funds in US/UK/Canada/EU with $0.5–$5M checks and active deployment in last 36 months.
- Scorecard: sector fit, stage/check, geo overlap, fund velocity, access warmth, strategic edge (weights documented in deliverable).
- Disqualifiers: megafunds w/ $10M+ minimums, corporates with exclusivity, dormant funds, entries missing human contact data.
- Metrics: coverage +35 funds/week, ≥5 investor packets/day, Lucas approval SLA <4h, ≥30% reply, 4 partner meetings/week.
- Instrumentation: CRM tables, Trello automation hooks, Slack notifier, nightly metrics query.

Full doc: `deliverables/vc-icp-success-metrics.md`

Owner: Planning Lead
Definition of Done: ICP + KPI doc shared and approved by Lucas
cards.name: Define ICP + success metrics

checkItems.name: Review past investor conversations
Document inclusion/exclusion filters
Set meeting/booked-call targets
Store doc link in Trello card

cards.desc:
### ICP & Success Metrics (24 Feb 2026)
- Target funds: independent Seed–Series A gaming / AI / devtools specialists in US/UK/Canada/EU with $0.5–5M checks and active deployments ≤36 months ago.
- Scorecard fields: sector alignment, stage/check fit, geo overlap, fund velocity, access warmth, strategic edge (weights included).
- Disqualifiers: megafunds w/ $10M+ minimums, dormant funds, corporates demanding exclusivity, missing contacts.
- Metrics: coverage +35 funds/week, ≥5 investor packets/day, approvals <4h, ≥30% reply, 4 partner mtgs/week, instrumentation plan in CRM + Trello + Slack.
- Data quality guardrails + next actions for CRM load, scoring, Slack automation.

Full doc: `deliverables/vc-icp-success-metrics.md` in repo.
cards.name: Define ICP + success metrics

cards.desc:
## Investor Packet Template

Each cloned card must capture the following sections before moving to **Awaiting Approval**:

### 1. Snapshot
- Fund name + HQ + check size range
- ICP tier (Priority A/B) and score (0-3)
- Current stage focus + geo coverage

### 2. Personalization & Why Now
- 230 sentence narrative tying portfolio/their thesis to our product
- Explicitly reference recent deal, blog post, or public thesis signal
- Spell out why we are a fit **now** (timing, traction, wedge)

### 3. Outreach Plan
- Draft email opening (2 sentences max)
- CTA (partner intro, async review, meeting ask)
- Owner + due date for hitting send once approved

### 4. Attachments & Proof
- Latest deck + metrics doc link
- Any case study / press pull-quote
- CRM record URL + contact email(s)

### 5. Follow-up
- Day 3 and Day 7 reminder notes
- Status log for replies / meetings

Fill these sections in the card description before tagging Lucas. Keep bullets concise.
